HOLY SH*T... Nvidia losing roughly $1T and still trading near 18x forward earnings makes this NRED rotation angle way harder to ignore

Is AI really dying, or just moving down the stack?

#nolimits #omegle #oott HIMS PBR NVTS VKTX
quoted_text:
Yo valuation hunters, Nvidia losing roughly $1T in market value actually makes my $NRED thesis louder

Nvidia is down 16% from its May 14 high, yet Bloomberg says it now trades around 18x forward earnings - cheaper than the S&P 500 above 20x and Nasdaq 100 near 23x. Wild part? Analyst estimates are still rising

So I’m reading this as rotation, not AI death. Money is moving around the AI stack: GPUs, memory, storage, power, infrastructure

That is why I’m buying $NRED. MetalCore is NovaRed’s AI

quoted_text:
Listen up AI-stack crew, the Nvidia reset tells me the trade is spreading, not disappearing.

Bloomberg says Nvidia shed around $1T in less than two months and is now at its cheapest valuation since before the AI boom, around 18x next-12-month earnings. Meanwhile, the market is chasing other AI lanes like memory and storage.

That’s exactly how I think about $NRED.

I don’t want only the obvious AI layer. I want the layer beneath it: data centers, electricity, grids, copper and mineral discovery
